headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Plans Tax Free Spin Off Of NBCUniversal And Sky
summary: Comcast (NasdaqGS:CMCSA) plans to separate NBCUniversal, including Sky, from its broadband and wireless operations through a tax-free spin-off. The transaction would create two independent, publicly traded companies focused on media and connectivity. The restructuring is framed as a way to give each business clearer priorities and room to pursue distinct strategies. For investors watching Comcast, this proposed breakup touches two big pieces of the communications and entertainment sectors...

headline: Big Tech Catches a Bid But Microsoft Is Walking Toward Its Worst Month Since 2008
summary: Wall Street finally exhaled on Monday with a broad tech rebound, but the largest software name in the world refused to come along. Alphabet stepped into the Dow, SpaceX into the Russell, and Rocket Lab paid eight billion dollars to take on a satellite incumbent, a session full of headlines, but only one of them was strange.
